title: Sealapack Wheelie Bin Liner Bags, Pack Of 5
features: KEEP CLEAN: Sealapack Wheelie Bin Liner Bags help to keep the bin cleaner between collections to empty them. Without regular cleaning wheelie bins become dirty with lingering odours, using a bag will help to keep the bin cleaner catching spills from broken and damaged household waste bags dropped into the bin
RELIABLE: Sealapack Wheelie Bin Liner Bags are part of a reliable collection of essential household bags, designed to work time after time.
HEAVY DUTY: Wheelie bins are difficult to keep clean, save time and cleanings cost by using a reliable, heavy duty liner
MULTI-USE: Each bag can be used in any wheelie bin to catch any spills or debris and help keep them clean.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: EASY TO USE ROLL OF 5 bags
